workers.name: vitest-flakes
workers.task: Audit + (if needed) fix 2 pre-existing vitest flakes: (1) `web-modern/src/components/shell/AppLauncher.test.tsx` last test 'renders the Armenian labels for at least one app (bilingual UX contract)' — the `getByText('Հաճախորդներ')` flake. (2) `web-modern/src/routes/app/fiscal-gates/index.test.tsx:169-185` — the `waitFor + querySelectorAll` row-count flake. Also audit 4 fleet tests in `web-modern/src/lib/fleet/__tests__/status.test.ts` (fixed in 10.6 W2 commit 1c49ec4 — confirm still green). Run `timeout 60 pnpm vitest run --bail=1 <file>` for each. If a test fails in isolation, edit the TEST (NOT the source). Common fixes: change `getByText` to `findByText` with `timeout: 5000`; change `waitFor + custom assertion` to `findAllByTestId(/^data-table-row-/, {}, { timeout: 10000 })`. NO source edits, NO `_helpers.ts` edits, NO `package.json`/`tsconfig.json`/`vite.config.ts` edits. Audit gates in order: (1) each test isolated, (2) cluster vitest (shell + fiscal-gates + fleet), (3) full vitest (≤2 pre-existing flakes), (4) typecheck, (5) i18n extract, (6) build. Use `timeout 300` on all bash. If no fixes needed, report `STATUS: NOOP-FIX-NEEDED`. Branch: wip/phase10-9-vitest-flakes-vitest-flakes. Tag: phase10-9-vitest-flakes-vitest-flakes-v1. Push: ant. Do NOT use mcp__claude-in-chrome__* tools. Do NOT add debug instrumentation. Do NOT spawn subagents. Report handoff and status at .orchestration/phase10-9-vitest-flakes/vitest-flakes/{handoff.md,status.md}. Wall-clock budget: 30 min. Set `NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048` to avoid OOM in 16 GB shared system (wave-3 workers are using ~10 GB).
